scripts.db:migrate:init: pnpm --filter database exec prisma migrate dev --name init_approval_system --create-only
scripts.db:migrate:dev: pnpm --filter database exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: pnpm --filter database exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter database exec prisma db seed
scripts.db:push: pnpm --filter database exec prisma db push
scripts.db:pull: pnpm --filter database exec prisma db pull
